description_long: This is a modern, metallic green sedan with a streamlined body and a gently sloping roofline, designed for urban and suburban environments. The vehicle features four passenger doors, a rear hatch, and a set of silver alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design. The windows are tinted, and the car has a subtle chrome trim around the windows and grille, giving it a refined appearance. The front end is characterized by a wide grille and sleek headlights, while the rear includes distinctive taillights and a subtle integrated spoiler. The car sits on a textured, industrial-style platform with a yellow-black hazard border, suggesting a display or inspection setting. The overall build and finish indicate a focus on both aesthetics and functionality, typical of contemporary sedans.
description: A metallic green, modern sedan with four doors, silver multi-spoke wheels, and chrome trim, featuring a sleek, urban design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the taillights, rear hatch, and subtle spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, silver wheels, and chrome window trim.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, sleek headlights, and smooth hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and side mirrors.
attribute_wheel_design: Silver alloy wheels with a multi-spoke pattern, each wheel featuring approximately 10 thin, evenly spaced spokes.
